description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a modern main battle tank, featuring a low, angular hull and a prominent rotating turret. The turret is equipped with a long, cylindrical main cannon and several raised hatches and periscopes, suggesting multiple crew positions. The vehicle's exterior is covered in a camouflage paint scheme with irregular patches of green, tan, and black, designed to break up its outline. The hull and turret both display thick, sloped armor plating, with additional details such as molded panels and surface textures indicating reinforced protection. The vehicle rides on a set of wide, continuous tracks, which are partially visible beneath the hull, providing mobility over rough terrain. No visible military markings or insignia are present, and the vehicle lacks any visible tires, relying solely on its tracked system for movement.
description: A camouflaged, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a large turret-mounted cannon and sloped armor plating, painted in green, tan, and black. The vehicle features molded details and continuous tracks for mobility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long main cannon, sloped armor, and the full length of the tracks.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, angular hull, the central cannon, and the camouflage pattern on the front armor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the turret and cannon visible, as well as the rear section of the tracks.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, rear armor, and the ends of the tracks.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts or hardpoints.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Irregular woodland camouflage pattern with green, tan, and black patches in a disruptive style.
